    Outreach Openers

    Trusted by revenue teams

    See how B2B sales teams are closing deals faster with OCTOPILOT signal intelligence.

    "OCTOPILOT found us 3 enterprise deals in the first week that we would have completely missed. The AI summaries are scarily accurate."

    SC

    VP of Sales, Dataloop

    "We replaced our manual Reddit monitoring workflow with OCTOPILOT. What used to take 4 hours a day now happens automatically with better results."

    Simple, transparent pricing

    Start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

    Pro

    Perfect for individual reps and small teams.

    $299/month
    • 5 active trackers
    • 500 signals per month
    • HubSpot CRM integration
    • Email alert digest
    • AI-generated openers
    • 1 workspace
    Start Free Trial
    Most Popular

    Growth

    For scaling revenue teams that need more firepower.

    $599/month
    • Unlimited trackers
    • 2,000 signals per month
    • All CRM integrations
    • Slack real-time alerts
    • Team collaboration (15 seats)
    • API access
    • Priority support
    Start Free Trial

    Enterprise

    Custom workflows and SLAs for large organizations.

    $1,200/month
    • Everything in Growth
    • Unlimited signals
    • Unlimited seats
    • SSO / SAML
    • Dedicated account manager
    • Custom integrations
    • Custom SLA & uptime guarantee
